_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Minecraft: Legacy Console Edition
author: cirro@snep.lol
description:
Minecraft: Legacy Console Edition, now containerized!
Includes plugin loader by sylvessa. (https://github.com/sylvessa)

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

# Minecraft: Legacy Console Edition Dedicated Server install script
# Server files: /mnt/server

apt update
apt install -y curl unzip

cd /mnt/server

curl -OL https://github.com/sylvessa/MCLCE/releases/download/nightly-dedicated-server/LCEServerWindows64.zip
file LCEServerWindows64.zip
unzip -o LCEServerWindows64.zip
rm LCEServerWindows64.zip
